summary: Extract Workbench candidate review, evidence, runtime identity snapshot, and final top-result persistence from the public store facade.
rationale: WorkbenchStore is a red-zone BFF persistence boundary. This PR preserves candidate review behavior, runtime finalization persistence, and detail evidence writes while moving candidate persistence into a focused store module with conn-level callback injection.
verification: uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_workbench_store_decoupling.py tests/test_workbench_runtime_owned_execution.py::test_runtime_final_candidate_persistence_batches_homogeneous_rows tests/test_workbench_runtime_owned_execution.py::test_runtime_checkpoint_persists_candidate_index_without_finalization tests/test_workbench_runtime_owned_execution.py::test_runtime_final_candidate_evidence_facts_update_on_repeated_finalization tests/test_workbench_api.py::test_cts_runtime_results_create_candidate_review_queue_without_raw_payload tests/test_workbench_api.py::test_final_top10_exposes_runtime_final_candidate_fields_directly tests/test_workbench_api.py::test_candidate_review_action_and_note_persist_with_csrf -q
